text: The following events were reported: Hail, Lightning, Thunderstorm Wind. These occurred near station USW00012918, approximately 21.7923 km away, between 2023-03-27 22:40:00 and 2023-03-28 04:50:00. The events included records with hailstones measuring 18.458333333333332 inches.Thankfully, no injuries or fatalities were reported. The events caused property damage valued at 35000.0 and crop damage of 0.0. Episode Narrative: A series of severe thunderstorms produced large hail and strong, damaging winds during the overnight hours of March 27 as a cold front drifted southward toward the coastline. A series of severe thunderstorms produced large hail and strong, damaging winds during the overnight hours of March 27 as a cold front drifted southward toward the coastline. Event Narrative: Strong thunderstorm winds knocked over several shipping containers at an industrial facility in Deer Park. A lightning strike ignited a fire in a church along FM 518 in League City, causing damage to the building. A member of the public measured golf ball sized hail in a residential area of Deer Park. Video posted to social media showed estimated half dollar size hail in the Deer Park area. Images from a member of the public showed gold ball sized hail near Morgan's Point. An MPING user reported quarter sized hail in La Porte. Thunderstorm winds downed large tree limbs in a neighborhood in La Porte.

An MPING user reported quarter sized hail in La Porte. Thunderstorm winds downed large tree limbs in a neighborhood in La Porte.

A lightning strike ignited a fire in a church along FM 518 in League City, causing damage to the building. A member of the public measured golf ball sized hail in a residential area of Deer Park. Video posted to social media showed estimated half dollar size hail in the Deer Park area. Images from a member of the public showed gold ball sized hail near Morgan's Point. An MPING user reported quarter sized hail in La Porte. Thunderstorm winds downed large tree limbs in a neighborhood in La Porte.

The following events were reported: Hail, Lightning, Thunderstorm Wind. These occurred near station USW00012918, approximately 21.7923 km away, between 2023-03-27 22:40:00 and 2023-03-28 04:50:00. The events included records with hailstones measuring 18.458333333333332 inches.Thankfully, no injuries or fatalities were reported. The events caused property damage valued at 35000.0 and crop damage of 0.0.
